string 2: Oh, it's you folks! You met Lord Vulcanusmon, didn't you!
{next}How did you know?
{next}Yes... And I had a pretty hard time of it, too...
{next}No, not yet.

Because the electricity is back on! I knew you folks would
come through!
I bet it wasn't! That was something none of us could do!

Come on! Quit with the kidding! You talked to Vulcanusmon
down there by the reactor on the lowest level, didn't you!
There are still some Titans left, but we can handle the rest!

Now that you've done that, the Locomon Railroad should be 
working! Try going up this way and heading for the station!

We've got our hands full fending off the Titans here, so
could you head down to the lowest level on your own?

You'll need the help of Kokuwamon here in the village to
reach the lowest level. Go talk to Kokuwamon first, okay?
Thanks for your help. We'll handle everything else from here!

The Locomon Railroad should be working now! The station is 
up this way and just ahead. You should make your way there!

My apologies, but the Locomon Railroad isn't operating
right now, due to a lack of power.

Now that power has been restored, we're making preparations
to depart. Please wait a while longer.

TO MY DISMAY, SOME OF THE GUARDROMON UNDER MY CONTROL HAVE
GONE HAYWIRE...

THE GUARDROMON IN THE LOWER LEVELS ARE VERY LIKELY TO ATTACK.
IF YOU DECIDE TO GO, PLEASE PROCEED WITH CAUTION.

ALTHOUGH THEY ARE OUR COMRADES, THIS IS AN EMERGENCY SITUATION,
SO THERE IS NO NEED TO HOLD BACK IF ATTACKED.

INFORMATION HAS BEEN SHARED.
THE PROBLEM APPEARS TO BE SOLVED.

BUT WE DO NOT KNOW IF OR WHEN THE TITANS WILL ATTACK AGAIN.
WE MUST REINFORCE OUR SECURITY WHILE WE CAN.
Ngh... I can't move...

If I had a new fuse, I could be of some help. If it isn't
too much trouble, could you bring me one?
One of my friends in the village should have one. Thanks.

Oh, no... You mean the merchant was out of fuses?
Uh-oh. That complicates things.

Is there any way to get you back up and running
without a fuse?
Well... maybe, say, a HUGE burst of electricity...

I might be able to reactivate if I were given a powerful
jolt that got me crackling like a livewire.
WOOOOO HOOOOOOO...! AW, YEAH! HERE WE GOOOOOOOOOOO!

I'm buzzing! Crackling! Bursting with life! More juiced up
than I've ever been!
U-Um...
Oops. Pardon the little slip in my composure, there.

You have my sincere thanks, everyone! As you can see, I'm
working once again.

Guardromon told me everything. You wish to see Lord
Vulcanusmon, yes?

That's right. If you're back in working order, can you show
us the way?
Sadly... I still can't do that.

I assume you're aware that I sealed the bulkheads to
prevent the contagious enemy hack from spreading.

Beyond the bulkheads, you'll find not only my berserk
comrades, but stable ones who got trapped in there as well.

I tried to keep the bulkheads open until they could get
out, but, in the end, I had to stave off the greater calamity...

That must've been so difficult for you... But I don't think
anyone would blame you for making that choice.
...Thank you for your kind words.

One of the comrades trapped inside the bulkheads is my
partner.

The reactor on the lowest level where Lord Vulcanusmon
resides can't be reached without both of us present.

Then it sounds like we need to go in and rescue your
partner.

You helped me, so I know you're up to the task. So, will
you go in and aid my partner and other comrades?

I would accompany you, but it's still too dangerous to
leave this bulkhead open.

Duty demands I remain here and close it again immediately
after you pass through.

No problem. We can handle it! We'll save your partner and
your friends!
You have my sincere gratitude!

There are Titans wreaking havoc beyond the bulkheads as
well.

Please let me know once you're ready and I'll open this
bulkhead.

Ugh! They've taken over our gun battery, our pride and joy!
How dare they use it!

They're not doing it justice! I'd finish the enemies
off in better fashion!

Woo hoo! We got our gun battery back! Now I can
send the enemy flying, one after the other!

ATTACKED BY TITANS. CANNOT FLY.
CANNOT SPEAK PROPERLY.
EMERGENCY SITUATION.

Phew. We can't let our guards down yet, but I see
you managed to drive the Titans away somehow.

I wasn't doing so great earlier, but I'm fine now.
All's well that ends well, right? Hahaha.

Aren't you the folks who were riding Blimpmon?
You're everywhere!

You don't look like Titans, that's for sure.
But this really isn't the best time to come here.

We're under attack by the Titans. You won't even
be able to sleep in peace. Take care!
Yes! The power is back on, so I can start repairs immediately!
Hmm... Is there any way to get that bulkhead open, I wonder?
If Kokuwamon could get back on its feet, Kokuwamon could open it.

Kokuwamon is on their feet again!
We'll take any good news we can get!

The Titans have been stopped in their tracks!
I'm so glad to hear it!
It's so hot here! I wanna board Locomon and go somewhere cooler.

Locomon's finally workin' again! We should go
somewhere nice and cool!
Sorry. I can't move after that attack just now...
I'll stay right here, so go to the village!

The power is back! And I hear Locomon is back online, too.
I'm really glad!
I still can't move... You'll hafta take Locomon to get back!
My clearance doesn't extend beyond this point. I'll wait here.
I'm sorry, but I don't have enough power to move right now.

If electric power was restored to the Factorial Area, 
I'd be able to move again...

Hello! It's been a while, but I can finally move again. 
All thanks to you guys, right? You have my gratitude!

We're in a bit of a pickle right now. The elevator back there
is shut down and can't be used.
I wonder if my friends are okay beyond the gate...

The elevator is working! And my friends are okay? 
Glad to hear it!

Once you're inside, you won't be able to get back out
for some time.
Have you made your preparations?
{next}We're ready. Let's get to work.
{end}We need a little more time.
Sure thing. Be sure you're fully prepared!

All right. Then I'll open the bulkhead, and you hurry
inside. Commencing opening procedure!
Now, hurry through!
I can operate the bulkhead, so please take care of the rest!

Find my partner Kokuwamon first. We share information
through comms, so they know to expect you.
Okay, I'm closing the bulkhead. Take care of yourselves!

Welcome back, partner! And the rest of you as well! 
Our allies made it back safely, too!
And we owe it all to you. Thank you again!

By the way, I hear you have business with Lord Vulcanusmon?
Now it's our turn to help you!
Yes, let's head there right away!
Glad to see you're all in one piece!
Oh, it's you guys! Thanks for before. You really saved my hide!

Seems like things are beginnin' to calm down now, but 
earlier, my allies suddenly attacked me!

Not sure what caused it... 
Maybe that was because of the Titans, too?

My suit is finally back in working order. If it had been 
one hundred percent, I'm sure I could've managed the situation.

This sudden malfunction came out of the blue. I'd better 
come up with some countermeasures for next time...
Thank you for your help! You're our saviors!

We were able to put this area back in proper order,
thanks to you!
We're truly grateful!

Visitors to Vulcanusmon's Treasures are invited to use the
UltimateBrachiomon Slide!

Ah, I see you have a Perpetual Passport! Thank you for your
patronage!
[Go down the slide.]
{end}[Pass for now.]

Now, off you go to Vulcanusmon's Treasures! Enjoy your
visit!

Ah, I see you have some Kokuwamon Tickets!
You may use the slide for one ticket!
[Use a Kokuwamon Ticket to go down the slide.]
{end}[Pass for now.]
You need a coupon to use the slide!
The door is shut tight.
Hello there! Welcome to Kokuwamon Park!

Welcome to the viewing deck! This is the most scenic spot in
all of Factorial Town.

The entry gate to the Hall of the Kokuwamon Hero is right
this way!

Ah, I see you have a Perpetual Passport! Thank you for your
patronage!
Please enjoy Kokuwamon Park to your heart's content!

We hope you enjoy the finest view in all of the Factorial
Area!

And now, without further ado... let the Tale of the
Kokuwamon Hero begin!
Hello there! Welcome to Kokuwamon Park!

Welcome to the viewing deck! This is the most scenic spot in
all of Factorial Town.

The entry gate to the Hall of the Kokuwamon Hero is right
this way!

Ah, I see you have some Kokuwamon Tickets!
You may enter for one ticket!
[Use a Kokuwamon Ticket to enter.]
{end}[Don't enter.]
[Use a Kokuwamon Ticket to enter.]
{end}[Don't enter.]
Enjoy your visit to Kokuwamon Park!

Welcome to Kokuwamon Park! Please purchase a ticket before
entering!

Please buy a ticket if you would like to go to the viewing
deck!

Please buy a ticket if you would like to enter the Hall of
the Kokuwamon Hero!
We sell tickets over here!
Thank you for your patronage!

This is an exhibit that recreates the Locomon of bygone
days!

Ah, I see you have a Perpetual Passport! You can listen to
the presentation whenever you wish!
[Listen to the presentation.]
{end}[Pass for now.]
Thank you! Now, let me begin... Ahem!

Ah, I see you have some Kokuwamon Tickets!
You may listen to the presentation for one ticket!
[Use a Kokuwamon Ticket to listen to the presentation.]
{end}[Pass for now.]
Please purchase a ticket to listen to the presentation!

Have you ever ridden the Locomon Railroad? Locomon is an
essential Digimon for traveling between different regions.

They perform a variety of roles, from providing long-range
travel unaffected by weather, to transporting heavy cargo.

Though their deeds may not be as conspicuous as those of
Kokuwamon, this land wouldn't be what it is without Locomon.

Here, strength is everything. Only those who've proven 
themselves worthy may pass. Go back the way you came!

What's that...? Hm? The SDGP?
You say you're the Material World's champion?!

I've heard rumors about your world's arena. If I let you enter, 
it'll be quite the spectacle. Okay, you may pass.

Enter whenever you want!
I look forward to seeing you fight!

You must be the unit who neutralized the intruder. I've
been informed of the situation. You have my gratitude.

I also engaged the target, but it eluded me after I was
immobilized by its counterattack.

Though injured, it was a formidable foe... so your
assistance was most welcome.

Welcome to Kokuwamon Park! THE place for fun in the
Factorial Area!

Tickets can be purchased in the square down the pathway to
the right! We also have Free Passes for sale!
That should be your first stop!

You can reach Vulcanusmon's chamber by sliding down from
here.

This attraction was built to honor a hero who once saved
this place...

...but it does not compute. I fail to understand the
thought process behind this...
Welcome! Now, please board the elevator!
The viewing deck is just ahead. Please enjoy the view!

If you would like to enter the Hall of the Kokuwamon Hero,
stand before the door with your ticket or Free Pass ready.
Please use this elevator to go back.

The hotel doesn't have any vacancies at the moment. We're
very sorry.
Callismon rules the Factorial Area now.

And Callismon's cronies are taking advantage of Lord
Vulcanusmon's absence to run amok, too.

Did Lord Vulcanusmon leave the Digital World like Little
Bearmon did?
They say Callismon joined the Titans looking for power...

And to think that, until recently, he used to be all about
taking the Titans down.

What exactly happened here while I was away in the forest,
anyway?

This place is... so much livelier than before. I wonder what
happened. Let's go have a look around town.

An elaborately-made mannequin of Kokuwamon. It almost looks
alive from a distance.

A model depicts the way Locomon looked back when they were
in operation.

Sure, it's lively, kind of like it was before, but this isn't the
same Factorial Town...
Wanna play cards? I got plenty of free time.
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
Okay. Just let me know if you change your mind!

Darn, I lost. And this was just supposed to be a pleasant
pastime...

I did it! I won! This is gonna put me in a good mood for 
the rest of the day!
Let's play cards! I got some new ones I want to try out!
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

Got it! But I'll be here whenever you're ready, working on
building a better deck.
Aw, I lost! But it isn't the deck that's bad. It's my playing!

Wow, I won. This deck seems pretty good, so I guess I'll
get in some more practice with it!
Look over there! It's Kokuwamon!

Look! That large group is clearly bullying the weaker one! 
We've got to do something!

There isn't enough power to operate it. We'll need a
battery.
Powering on!
Okay, let's press forward!
There's no need to operate that now.
I'm back!

Ah, there you are! I've gotten word about you! Well, let's
get right to it. Could you lend us a hand?

Thank you. I'm the partner of the Kokuwamon you met out
front, by the way.

My partner already filled me in on the details. Lend me
your strength in rescuing our comrades who couldn't escape!

We need to use that crane you can see over there. Come on.
Let's go!
You, there...! Help...!
Someone's calling for help! Let's go!
I think I can get in through there! I'll be right back.
Hey! Where are you going...?! Don't run away...!
This is terrible! How extremely cruel!
Simply heartless!

Help has arrived! How are you holding up?
I've got it from here!

Safe at last! Thank you. But more of our comrades
are still trapped inside!

Sorry to trouble you, but please use this to save them!
I beg of you!
Somebody! Anybody! Come quick!
Please! Get those poor little guys outta the rubble!

Whew! I woulda burnt 'em if I had tried... so thanks
a bunch! Really! Take this for your trouble.
They're trapped under the rubble! You gotta help!
My comrades are inside the gate! Head over that way!
Hey, you! I got a favor to ask!

Our ally inside started acting crazy! Ya gotta calm it down! 
Please!

Whoa, whoa! What's gotten into you?! C'mon, comrade! Stop
this!

DESTROY ALL ENEMIES! DESTROY ALL ENEMIES! YOU ARE AN ENEMY!
YOU WILL BE DESTROYED!
I can't believe I lost control... How pathetic...

I don't know who you people are, but thank you! We owe you
one!
Thank ya for yer help! Here's a token of our gratitude!
SOMEONE, COME QUICK!
IT'S ALL OVER!
DAAAMMMIIIT! I'M STUCK!!!!!

Hey, you! Help! Those two went berserk all of a sudden and
I can't get them under control!

DESTROY ALL ENEMIES! DESTROY ALL ENEMIES! DESTROY...
ENEMIES!
Wow! You're strong! Thanks!
I went berserk...?
I apologize for all the trouble... I truly thank you.
Here. Take this. You earned it!
Oh, yeah. Here's another present for you!

Hey, you're strong! I need help! Can you break this door
down for me?
Awesome! Thanks! We should be able to escape now.
It's not much, but here. Hope it helps!
Hey! Someone bust this door down!
Here. Take this as well. Put it to good use!
Owww...! Hey, who did that?! Stop pushin'!
Listen up! Ya better not push me! Ya got that?!
[Push.]
[Don't push.]
Ouch! That hurts! I told ya! No pushin'!
D-DON'T PUSH!
No, no, no!
"Don't push" means "push." Don't ya get it?!
[Push.]
[Don't push.]
OWWW! DON'T PUSH!
Whew... Sweet, sweet freedom.
Who... are you...?
Who am I? I'm Nanimon!
"Nannymon"? You take care of little Digimon kids...?
No! I'm "Nanimon!" Clean out your damn ears!

But never mind that... So, are ya wonderin' how I got
stuck?

Well... I certainly wasn't huntin' for treasu— But, hey,
enough about me!

There's no treasure or anythin' here, so ya'd better just
skedaddle! Like, now!
...Eh, fine. Look. I'll give ya this, so scram!
Oh, yeah. Here's another present for ya! I don't need it!
Destroying the rubble should free them.

That should be the last of our allies who got stuck in here. 
Thank you!

Okay, let's get back to my partner. The others you helped
should've made it out by now, too.

What's with all these evacuees? But, whatever... Now, down 
to business!
This is the super-duper, fun crane show!

Ah, I see you have a Perpetual Passport! Thank you for your
patronage!
[Watch the crane show.]
{end}[Pass for now.]
Okay, the fun crane show is about to begin!

Ah, I see you have some Kokuwamon Tickets!
You may watch the show for one ticket!
[Use a Kokuwamon Ticket to watch the show.]
{end}[Pass for now.]
You need a ticket to enjoy this attraction!
And that ends the show! Thank you for watching!
This is the super crane show!

Ah, I see you have a Perpetual Passport! Thank you for your
patronage!
[Watch the crane show.]
{end}[Pass for now.]
Now, let the super crane show begin!

Ah, I see you have some Kokuwamon Tickets!
You may watch the show for one ticket!
[Use a Kokuwamon Ticket to watch the show.]
{end}[Pass for now.]
You need a ticket to watch the crane show!
And that concludes the show!

...All we do is switch things around, but young Digimon
really love it.

I didn't know what to expect when the area was closed off,
but I'm glad to see everything safe and sound.

Well, I guess there are some broken bits here and there, so
we're going to be busy with repairs for a while.
This ought to be okay... Huh?
Oh, it's you. Thanks to you, my suit is fit as a fiddle!

Between that, and you saving our comrades, I'm truly
grateful to you. Thank you.
But... and I hate to say this when I owe you so much...

...I'm going to make note of how you tried to abandon me
back there.

Hey! How about making sure there aren't any malfunctions
next time!
Oh, it's you guys! Thanks for stopping by!

But weren't you gonna hurry on ahead? We're fine here, so
get going!
Where's the intruder?! Is it you?!

...No, wait. The report said it's a merchant and that it
has more legs than you do...

If it was able to sneak in while we were fighting that
colossal Titan... then we need to tighten our security!
What in the heck was that ginormous Digimon before, anyway?

I heard from folks that fought it that it just suddenly
appeared from outside...
I wonder where it was sent from... and what it was after!

The threat might be gone, but it sure left us with a lot of
questions...

Now, then! Let's get it in gear and fix what's broken, 
partner!
You bet! My suit feels lighter somehow, so I got this!

Oh! Thank you for earlier! As you can see, my partner here 
is back to normal!

I don't know if you're tourists or what, but you have my
thanks! I owe you one!

THE INFORMATION HAS BEEN SHARED WITH ME. THE DESTRUCTION
WAS APPARENTLY QUITE EXTENSIVE.

IT WAS UNAVOIDABLE, GIVEN THE EMERGENCY, AND YET... I AM
UNSURE OF HOW TO PROCEED.

BUT IF IT HAS DISAPPEARED SO COMPLETELY, PERHAPS THAT IS
ALL THE MORE REASON TO LEAVE THINGS AS THEY ARE.
I can't believe I was controlled like a puppet...

I don't remember much, but the guilt will never leave
me...

No point in crying over spilled oil, though. There are
repairs to be made.
Oh, it's you! Thank you for before!

Hey, did you try out that thing I gave you?! I was saving
it for a special occasion, so make sure you use it!

My comrade shared the details with me. I appreciate your
aid in reclaiming this section.
We're assigned to various posts to operate the machinery.
If you need to use the crane, we can operate it for you.

My comrade shared the information with me. I apologize for
not being much help during the lockdown.
We all share information through comms...

...but there are times when we suddenly lose contact,
or one of us meets an unfortunate fate...

The Titans' influence hampered things, but the link is
beginning to recover, so have no fear.
Hey, I heard about you from Kokuwamon A and B.

If you need the crane, I can operate it for you whenever
you want.
The information has been shared with me...

My comrade who was stationed here used the last
of their strength to close the bulkhead...

A real hero who fulfilled their duty to this place, they were...
I'd like to find some way to honor them.

Hm? Aren't you the one who fought that colossal Digimon? I 
must say, taking down a beast like that was quite the feat.
What? Did I see it, you ask? Well, look over there.

The area took a real beating in the battle.
I've been watching the repair work.

Oh, but no need to worry about all that. You have
somewhere else to be, no? Hurry on your way.
What a bunch of filthy lies... I can't stand it!

It was actually a hero from somewhere else that saved the 
day! Get real...!

As the fiendish Titans swarmed over the town, seizing its
citizens... a brave Kokuwamon plunged into peril, alone.

A seemingly reckless act, but Kokuwamon's deft manipulation
of electricity made quick work of the villains.

Kokuwamon mustered up their courage and marched into the
face of danger to save the people of the town.
Thus begins the Tale of the Kokuwamon Hero!

Ah, I see you have a Perpetual Passport! You can listen to

[Listen to the presentation.]
{end}[Pass for now.]
Now begins Chapter One of the Tale of the Kokuwamon Hero...

Battered and bruised, the gallant Kokuwamon arrived before
the captive townsfolk.

Paying no heed to their own wounds, Kokuwamon extended a
hand to the frightened prisoners, a hero in both name and form.

The hero's strength and kindness freed the citizens' hearts
from the grip of terror.

Kokuwamon fights to free the citizens! Step right up to
hear Chapter Two of the Tale of the Kokuwamon Hero!

Ah, I see you have a Perpetual Passport! You can listen to

Upon encountering citizens suffering beneath rubble,
Kokuwamon delivered salvation with their arms of steel.

In spite of the desperate situation, Kokuwamon remained
calm and collected as they swiftly removed the pile of debris.

Seeing the smiling faces of the now-free citizens only gave
our hero more motivation to press onward.

Innocent Digimon buried beneath rubble...! Come closer and
hear Chapter Three of the Tale of the Kokuwamon Hero!

Ah, I see you have a Perpetual Passport! You can listen to

[Listen to the presentation.]
{end}[Pass for now.]

What will be the fate of the city's Digimon?! The Tale of
the Kokuwamon Hero, Chapter Three...

You may listen to the presentation for one ticket!

The citizens driven berserk by the enemy's foul schemes were
champions on a level far outstripping Kokuwamon...

Any normal Digimon would have fled, too afraid to engage
them, but our hero was resolute.

Kokuwamon's desperate efforts to bring their friends to their
senses succeeded, resolving the crisis.

Kokuwamon faces rampaging townsfolk! Chapter Four of the
Tale of the Kokuwamon Hero is right over here!

Ah, I see you have a Perpetual Passport! You can listen to
the presentation whenever you wish!
[Listen to the presentation.]
{end}[Pass for now.]

Now, let me begin... The Tale of the Kokuwamon Hero,
Chapter Four...

Ah, I see you have some Kokuwamon Tickets!
You may listen to the presentation for one ticket!
[Use a Kokuwamon Ticket to listen to the presentation.]
{end}[Pass for now.]

Only a few foes remained... Kokuwamon steeled their resolve
and imbued their body with electricity.

Our hero then discharged energy from their pincers, shredding
the villains with their special move, Mini Scissor Claw!

The mighty attack brought the battle to an end! And so the 
Factorial Area was safe once more!

A final gallant deed! Come hear Chapter Five of the Tale of
the Kokuwamon Hero!

Ah, I see you have a Perpetual Passport! You can listen to
the presentation whenever you wish!
[Listen to the presentation.]
{end}[Pass for now.]

The end of the epic story is upon us! The Tale of the
Kokuwamon Hero, Chapter Five...

Ah, I see you have some Kokuwamon Tickets!
You may listen to the presentation for one ticket!
[Use a Kokuwamon Ticket to listen to the presentation.]
{end}[Pass for now.]

This is the card battle experience. Are you prepared?
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
As you wish. Please speak to me again when you're ready.

A resounding defeat. Masterfully done. I'll do my best to
provide an even better experience next time.

I win. It was a tough battle, but that just makes victory
all the more worth it.

Looks like the elevator Vulcanusmon
mentioned is over there!

We'll take care of the rest.
Let's get to work, partner!
Yeah, let's do it!
Vulcanusmon! Please excuse this intrusion!

There is a rumbling sound coming from within.
Enter?
[Enter.]{next}
{end}[Don't enter.]

Lord Vulcanusmon once oversaw the entirety 
of the Factorial Area from this central control unit.

Perhaps due to the unit having been created
with such complex functions, no one else was capable of operating it.

In Lord Vulcanusmon's absence, the control system has been modified 
so that those of us who remain can manage the area.

Simply seeing Lord Vulcanusmon's likeness is like a breath
of fresh air for the soul.

I see you have a Perpetual Passport. I'll deliver the
presentation whenever you like.
[Listen to the presentation.]
{end}[Pass for now.]

I see... As I suspected, you want to hear the
presentation...

Ah, I see you have some Kokuwamon Tickets!
You may listen to the presentation for one ticket!
[Use a Kokuwamon Ticket to listen to the presentation.]
{end}[Pass for now.]

Do you want to hear the presentation? Then please purchase
a ticket.

This is a depiction of Lord Vulcanusmon
crafting the right arm of the Divine Arms Version Ω.

Completion of the right arm brought dramatic 
improvements to transport efficiency within the Factorial Area.

It was also apparently used in tandem with
the previously-constructed left arm to drive off intruders.

If only I were blessed with but a fraction of Lord
Vulcanusmon's superior intellect...!

Is that a Perpetual Passport you hold? Would you like to
hear the presentation?
[Listen to the presentation.]
{end}[Pass for now.]

I hope this presentation will help you reach new heights
and further Digivolution...

Ah, I see you have some Kokuwamon Tickets!
You may listen to the presentation for one ticket!
[Use a Kokuwamon Ticket to listen to the presentation.]
{end}[Pass for now.]

Do you, too, wish to hear the presentation? Then please
